prerequisites: An Oura account, created via the Oura iOS or Android app and accessible at cloud.ouraring.com.
An Oura Personal Access Token generated from the Oura developer portal, used as the api_key.
Optionally, the start_datetime and end_datetime values that bound the time window of data to sync.

authMethods.name: Personal Access Token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key secret, which is an Oura Personal Access Token. Create the token at https://cloud.ouraring.com/personal-access-tokens and the connector sends it to the Oura API v2 as an HTTP Bearer credential (Authorization: Bearer {token}).

setupSteps.title: Create an Oura account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for Oura through the Oura iOS or Android app, then sign in at cloud.ouraring.com.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Personal Access Token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Oura developer portal at https://cloud.ouraring.com/personal-access-tokens, create a new Personal Access Token, add a note describing its use, and copy the generated token. It is shown once, so save it securely.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the Personal Access Token into the connector's required api_key field. The connector uses it as the Bearer credential when calling the Oura API v2.

setupSteps.title: Set the optional sync window
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_datetime and end_datetime to bound the time range of records the connector pulls. Both fields are optional; leave them empty to use the connector defaults.
